name: Town square
description:
You stand on the convergence of several streets, all of which were probably
once busy centers of commerce.  Now, nothing more than the occasional insect
scuttles across the street.  In the center of the crossing stands a joyful
fountain.  The cool water bubbles out of the top, and gurgles happily down
several tiers before splashing into the basin.  It lightens your spirit just
looking at it.
